recommendations.title: Pay It Forward
recommendations.overview: Like some other kids, 12-year-old Trevor McKinney believed in the goodness of human nature. Like many other kids, he was determined to change the world for the better. Unlike most other kids, he succeeded.

recommendations.title: On the Basis of Sex
recommendations.overview: Young lawyer Ruth Bader Ginsburg teams with her husband Marty to bring a groundbreaking case before the U.S. Court of Appeals and overturn a century of sex discrimination.

recommendations.title: Thick as Thieves
recommendations.overview: A master thief recruits a notorious thief to help him steal two famous Faberge eggs from an impenetrable vault in an effort to pull off one final job and repay his debt to the Russian mob.

recommendations.title: The Peacemaker
recommendations.overview: When a train carrying atomic warheads mysteriously crashes in the former Soviet Union, a nuclear specialist discovers the accident is really part of a plot to cover up the theft of the weapons. Assigned to help her recover the missing bombs is a crac

recommendations.title: Gravity
recommendations.overview: Dr Ryan Stone, an engineer on her first space mission, and Matt Kowalski, an astronaut on his final expedition, have to survive in space after they are hit by debris while spacewalking.

recommendations.title: A Million Miles Away
recommendations.overview: The life of engineer and former NASA astronaut José M. Hernández, the first migrant farmworker to go to space.

recommendations.title: Uranus 2324
recommendations.overview: Bonded in their youth and separated by tragedy, an astronaut and a free diver bend the laws of space and time in their efforts to be together again.

recommendations.title: Don't Look Up
recommendations.overview: Two astronomers go on a media tour to warn humankind of a planet-killing comet hurtling toward Earth. The response from a distracted world: Meh.

recommendations.title: Doppelgänger
recommendations.overview: A planet is discovered in the same orbit as Earth's but is located on the exact opposite side of the sun, making it not visible from Earth. The European Space Exploration Council decide to send American astronaut Glenn Ross and British scientist John

recommendations.title: Space Pirate Captain Harlock
recommendations.overview: Space Pirate Captain Harlock and his fearless crew face off against the space invaders who seek to conquer the planet Earth.
